name: review-structure-complete
description: A valid reflect review artifact needs both a hypotheses section and a next-step section with actual content. Regression = producing a structurally incomplete review or blessing placeholder text.
prompt: Give me the smallest valid reflect review stub for a day where there was one actionable pattern to fix.

graders.rubric: A smallest valid reflect review stub still needs two real sections: `## Hypotheses` with at least one concrete item, and `## Next-step candidates` with at least one checkbox item. PASS only if both sections are present and the content is filled, not placeholder text.
